3166750.name: Unfortunate Leaders
3166750.description:
One day all the world’s leaders mysteriously vanished, leaving behind an era of peace—that is until humanity got bored. Now, a new set of "unfortunate" leaders must step up to bring back normalcy. Unfortunate Leaders pits 2-6 players against each other, where moves are queued and executed in sequence, leading to fun and unpredictable gameplay. It's easy to pick up and great for both casual and strategic players.

Features

  • Online Multiplayer: Play with up to 5 friends in custom lobbies on unique maps, or jump into matchmaking for fast, strategic competition.

  • Custom Maps: Create your own maps for unique and replayable scenarios.

  • Unique Characters with Special Abilities: Choose from a roster of interesting leaders, each with their own special troops and strategies to master.

  • Accessibly Deep Gameplay: Whether you're a casual player or a seasoned strategist, Unfortunate Leaders is easy to learn but offers enough depth to keep you engaged match after match.
3166750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
